items.description:
Resolution - Approving the Appointment of Various Persons as Commissioners of
Deeds for 2025/2026.

Advertise Public Hearing — Relative to the D.P.W. 2026/2027 Municipal Sidewalk
Program, pursuant to Local Law 2-2021, for sidewalks\as detailed in\Exhibit “A”.
Total cost not to exceed $4,500,000. (Public Hearing to be held on Monday, May 4,
2026, at 1:00 P.M.

Authorize - Payment to various performances at Big Rig Day on Saturday, May 16,
2026. Total cost not to exceed $2,000 from Account #01.71400.540552.

Authorize — Payment to Public Broadcasting Council of CNY, for services received
during the 2025 Fiscal Year, which include the live streaming of various meetings.
Total amount not to exceed $10,342.50, charged to Account #595860.01.90000.

Amend — Ord #109 (04/14/2024), “Contract -With Esri, on behalf of the Office of
Analytics, Performance, & Innovation, for enterprise software licensing ($339,900)
and ongoing Advantage Program, professional support services ($430,581).
organizations: Esri, on behalf of the Office of Analytics, Performance, & Innovation

items.description:
Application - To the Municipal Infrastructure Program, administered.\by NYS Empire
State Development, (ESD) in an amount not to exceed $18.4 million.

Accept — From Hueber-Breuer Construction Co. Inc. (“HB”) an exterior sign (valued
at $13,650) as identified in Appendix “A”. In honor of Officer Michael Jensen and
Firefighter Ethan Cunningham, for they»new Public Safety Headquarters located at
1153 West Fayette Street.

Local Law - Of the City of Syracuse to add a new Chapter to Part L “entitled”
“Biometric Surveillance Law,” to prohibit the use of biometric surveillance systems by
owners and operators of places of public accommodation within the City of Syracuse,
as detailed in the legislation.

Transfer Funds — Within the July 1, 2025 — June 30, 2026, Syracuse City Budget, as
detailed in Attachment “A”.
Advertise Public Hearing — Annual Estimate — For the City of Syracuse and the
Syracuse City School District for the Fiscal Year July 1, 2025 — June 30, 2026.

Annual Estimate — For the City of Syracuse and the Syracuse City School! District for
the Fiscal Year July 1, 2025 — June 30, 2026. (Public Hearing to be held_on
Wednesday, April 29, 2025, at 5:30 P.M.)

Amend - Ord. #417 (06/09/2025), “Application — To the US Department of Housing
and Urban Development for the 2025-2026 (Year 51) Fourth Annual Action Plan:
Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) ($4,795,536), HOME Investment
Partnership Grant (HOME) ($1,278,623.

Local Law — Rescind — “Local Law - Of the City of Syracuse to authorize the sale of
all right, title, and interest in the real property located at 1039 East Fayette Street
(SBL 030.-23-19.

organizations: Esri, on behalf of the Office of Analytics, Performance, & Innovation
